result.stdout:
Description:
  Compile scss files using Dart Sass Compiller.

Usage:
  DartSassBuildWatcherTool [options]

Options:
  --files <files>                      The sass files that will be compiled to css.
  --dir <dir>                          The directory that contains files to be compiled to css.
  --exlude-dirs <exlude-dirs>          The file to read and display on the console.
  --watch <watch>                      Watch for changes on *.scss files in watch folder.
  --proj <proj>                        Get additional directories from the *.csproj.
  --map <map>                          Maps prefix path in @use or @import path to custom path. Example "--map _content/MyLib=.".
  --outputstyle <Compressed|Expanded>  The css output style. Can be "Compressed", "Expanded".
  --loglevel <Default|Silent|Verbose>  The log detalization during css compilation. Can be "Silent", "Default", "Verbose".
  --version                            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
